fresh_claude: SKIPPED — requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for --bare mode; OAuth auth disabled in bare mode; environment has OAuth only. Codex cross-model provides model-level generator-evaluator separation.

phase_a.summary: All planned artifacts present. All 10 ACs (A-J) have traceable test evidence. 119/119 integration assertions green. One note-level ownership lacuna (bin/frw, bin/alm, bin/sds touched per spec but not listed in plan.json wave-1 file_ownership).

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Claim: .gitignore mutation for consumers conflicts with XDG-only artifact storage.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: bin/frw, bin/alm, bin/sds, .gitignore, 12 hooks, normalize scripts outside file_ownership.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: SC2148 on 11 hook scripts lacking shebangs.

evaluator_notes.rationale: Spec §1h explicitly requires 'Add .bak patterns to install.sh gitignore bootstrap' for consumer mode. The .gitignore entry documents what's ignored; actual artifacts DO live under XDG. Codex misreads the AC as strictly 'no consumer-side writes', but spec allows the additive gitignore bootstrap.

evaluator_notes.finding: codex unplanned-changes FAIL (bin/frw, bin/alm, bin/sds, hooks, etc.)
evaluator_notes.rationale: Confirmed during Phase A: spec §rescue.sh calls for bin/frw dispatcher case, spec §Sort-by-id §Writer calls for bin/alm/bin/sds normalize hook integration, 1f required touching 12 hooks for common-minimal.sh switchover. plan.json's file_ownership omitted these. The work is spec-compliant; plan.json is the incomplete artifact.

evaluator_notes.finding: codex code-quality FAIL (SC2148 on hook fragments)
evaluator_notes.rationale: bin/frw.d/hooks/*.sh are function-definition fragments loaded by bin/frw, not executable scripts. SC2148 (missing shebang) is incorrect for this pattern. shellcheck needs a directive comment or the project needs a lint-exception config, but the code is correct as-is.

overall_rationale: Phase A evidence overwhelming (119/119 tests, all ACs traceable). Phase B codex FAILs are two false-positives and one known-pre-existing ownership artifact. No real bugs surfaced for this deliverable.

action_items.item: plan.json file_ownership schema improvement: allow declaring 'incidental writer-integration files' so 1k-style writer hooks can be enumerated.
Add shellcheck directive `# shellcheck shell=sh` to hook fragments OR add a .shellcheckrc exclude to skip SC2148 for the hook-fragment pattern.
